title: Define Prisma schema and run initial database migration
description: Define the complete Prisma schema covering User, Matter, MatterMember, Document, DocumentChunk, DocumentExtraction, Task, and ChatMessage. Enable pgvector extension. Run the initial migration against the Postgres database.

acceptance_criteria.text: All 8 core models defined in prisma/schema.prisma
pgvector extension referenced in schema and enabled via migration SQL
DocumentChunk has a vector(1536) embedding field
Initial migration runs cleanly against the Replit Postgres instance
Prisma client generated and importable from lib/db/client.ts

steps: Configure DATABASE_URL in .env and Replit Secrets
Add pgvector extension block to schema
Create lib/db/client.ts with Prisma singleton pattern
Verify migration output and generated client
risks: pgvector must be installed on the Postgres instance — verify availability on Replit's Postgres or Neon
vector(1536) field requires raw SQL migration for pgvector — use extendedPrismaClient or raw migration
